commands.repair_reason: Needs contributor real behavior proof and maintainer review; there is no narrow automated repair task because the patch itself looks coherent.; Cleared: The diff only changes Telegram polling session code and tests; it does not touch dependencies, workflows, secrets, package scripts, or other supply-chain surfaces. (sha=751adf080298b2d65e459887983139be09c945ba)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a parent-side Telegram polling liveness tracker and watchdog to isolated ingress, plus regression tests for stall restart, healthy polling, and custom threshold behavior.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main defaults Telegram polling to isolated ingress and stores pollingStallThresholdMs, but only the non-isolated polling cycle consults it. I did not run a live Telegram repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real behavior proof and maintainer review; there is no narrow automated repair task because the patch itself looks coherent.
